summary: Security review of Episodic Blueprint Architecture (EBA) system was initiated but failed three times due to tool/environment mismatches. All three attempts (2026-03-21T20:58:02.581Z, 2026-03-21T20:58:17.202Z, 2026-03-21T20:58:30.457Z) tried to discover project structure and map security boundaries using bash_execute, glob_find, grep_search, and code_analyzer tools, but encountered 'Tests failed with no output' failures. No actionable security findings were obtained.

decisions.description: Deferred detailed security review pending successful project discovery
decisions.rationale: Security analysis requires understanding system structure, entry points, authentication boundaries, and configuration before conducting privilege escalation analysis, unauthorized access risk assessment, and audit trail review

decisions.description: Switched from broad glob patterns to more targeted file discovery approach in Attempt 2
decisions.rationale: Initial attempt with maxdepth limits and multiple file type patterns was too broad; refined to use only allowed tools (file_read, glob_find, grep_search, bash_execute, code_analyzer)

decisions.description: Attempted systematic reconnaissance with glob_find wildcards and code_analyzer in Attempt 3
decisions.rationale: Previous attempts had too many concurrent tool invocations; shifted to sequential discovery pattern starting with basic directory structure mapping

rejected_ideas.idea: Use maxdepth-limited find commands with multiple file type patterns in single invocation
rejected_ideas.reason: Resulted in tool incompatibility or execution failure; approach was too complex for the execution environment

rejected_ideas.idea: Run broad grep_search across entire codebase for auth/token/secret patterns in single step
rejected_ideas.reason: Incomplete execution in Attempt 2; likely too resource-intensive or pattern too complex for baseline discovery phase

rejected_ideas.idea: Invoke test suite to validate project structure understanding
rejected_ideas.reason: Three consecutive attempts failed with 'Tests failed with no output'; suggests test infrastructure either doesn't exist, is misconfigured, or is inappropriate for discovery phase

risks.description: Tool execution environment may have constraints not yet understood - multiple attempts with different tool combinations all failed with identical 'no output' error
risks.mitigation: Next attempt should validate tool capabilities with minimal, single-tool invocations before complex discovery workflows

risks.description: Security review blocked indefinitely - three consecutive failures prevent gathering basic threat model information needed for privilege escalation, unauthorized access, and audit trail analysis
risks.mitigation: Diagnose tool execution environment; may need to engage system administrator or use alternative discovery methodology

risks.description: No project structure baseline established - cannot assess authentication boundaries, entry points, or credential handling without successful environment mapping
risks.mitigation: Establish minimal viable project discovery (single file listing) before attempting pattern-based analysis

open_threads.topic: Conduct detailed security review of EBA system
open_threads.context: Task requires: privilege escalation analysis, unauthorized access risks assessment, audit trail implications review, and final security recommendation. Blocked by inability to successfully discover project structure and map system architecture. Three consecutive failed discovery attempts (Attempts 1-3) all resulted in 'Tests failed with no output' errors.
open_threads.blocked_reason: All attempts exhausted: Tests failed with no output

open_threads.context: All three discovery attempts failed identically despite different tool combinations and strategies. Need to establish baseline tool functionality with minimal test case (e.g., simple file listing with single bash_execute invocation) before proceeding with security analysis.

open_threads.topic: Map EBA architecture layers and entry points
open_threads.context: Required as prerequisite for security review. Intended to include: project structure discovery, identification of authentication/authorization boundaries, credential/token handling locations, and privilege escalation surface areas.
